help.title: Help & Support
help.shareIdeasDesc: Have a feature or service idea? Tell us! Good ideas are implemented and adopted suggestions earn rewards.
help.needHelpDesc: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our team anytime.

faqs.a1: Community access and basic info are completely free. Some premium services may have costs, but initial consultation is always free.
faqs.q2: How long does it take to get help?
faqs.a2: We respond within 1-2 hours for most inquiries. For urgent matters, we prioritize faster responses.
faqs.q3: What documents do I need for a visa?
faqs.a3: It depends on your visa type. We offer personalized guidance - join the community or contact us for specific requirements.
faqs.q4: Can I use ANNYEONG before arriving in Korea?
faqs.a4: Absolutely! Our platform helps people prepare before they arrive, so you can get a head start on settling in.
faqs.a5: We support Korean, English, Chinese, Japanese, Vietnamese. More languages coming soon!
